runner.description: Universal kit execution with kill switch + TTL enforcement + Gemini summary. Pass ?kit=<name> to run any kit server-side.

intel.description: IoTendrils + IoVitals: stealth API sweep and health monitoring

full.description: All sisters combined: complete Io loadout

sweep.description: Universal Intelligence Kit — 22 modules, category drill-down, thingTriggers routing, place-aware queries, quakes time_range, poi v0.2 kind wiring, Trade Me raw passthrough (Session 35), Trade Me size-constraint integrity gate (Session 35), Trade Me preferences registry — 13 arbitrage filters incl. biggest-discount, on-sale, clearance, no-bids, reserve-not-met, buy-now-only, super-seller, pickup-available, afterpay (Session 35). v1.9.0 (Session 36): shared TM_PREFERENCES/tmApplyPreference/tmIntegrityFilter hoisted to kit level; trademe-cars/bikes/boats now surface arbitrage fields and apply preferences via the shared helper — one definition, four retail surfaces. v1.10.0 (Session 37): Listing Detail modules born — trademe-listing-detail (/v1/Listings/{id}.json) + trademe-similar (/v1/Listings/{id}/Similar.json) + investigateListing() entry point. Gated on qualifiesWhen:['listing_id']; normal search flows never dispatch them. Kit-runner accepts ?kit=sweep&listing_id=<id>. Severable from search.

nz-intel.description: NZ location intelligence — geocode, quakes, volcanoes, weather, elevation, POI, Wikipedia, Wikidata, intensity

trademe.description: Trade Me marketplace — attribute params (transmission, body_style, fuel_type, property_type) from resolver translation tables + price with auto-category
